title: Isle of Berk
description: Isle of Berk is a fan-made Minecraft Mod focusing on the How to Train Your Dragon universe (Movies, Series, Games, Books and so on).
body:
# THIS MOD IS DISCONTINUED

<center>

**CHECK THE NEW SUCCESSOR [HERE](https://discord.gg/r7CzMyajm7)**  
This mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/3.0.57) to run.

---
![header image](https://i.imgur.com/6lEaYAl.png)

</center>

## About the Mod
*Isle of Berk* was a fan-made Minecraft Mod focusing on the How to Train Your Dragon universe (Movies, Series, Games, Books and so on) created by ***Ghanou Craft***, ***Apprentice Necromancer***, ***TooTHleZZ*** and ***Arsian***. By playing Isle of Berk, you bring a whole new experience to your Minecraft World! It currently adds:
- 11 dragon species from the series (including some game variants); Night Fury, Light Fury, Nightlight, Skrill, Triple Stryke, Gronckle, Deadly Nadder, Monstrous Nightmare, Hideous Zippleback, Terrible Terror, Speed Stinger
- 1 dragon from the HTTYD live show; Stinger
